name: Zucchini Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Deluxe butter recipe golden cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 9x13" pan.
3. Combine cake mix, eggs, butter, and cinnamon in a large bowl.
4. Beat at low speed until moistened.
5. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes.
6. Stir in zucchini.
7. Pour into pan; sprinkle with walnuts.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until tested done.
9. Dust with powdered sugar.
